Common.erpSystemDescription: Designed for the characteristics of screen printing enterprises: mixed orders, multiple batches, short delivery times, and long processes. Using QR codes as the sole data carrier, through industrial PDA + mobile phone + PDF three-terminal collaboration, it connects the entire closed-loop from business order taking to vehicle delivery.
Common.triTerminalDescription: Industrial PDA, Mobile, and PDF QR Code three-terminal seamless collaboration
